P8106 Final Project SY3352

Su Yan

2026-05-10

Data setup

load("severity.RData")
set.seed(3352)
my_dat <- dat[sample(nrow(dat), 1000), ]
my_dat <- my_dat |> select(-id)

my_dat$severity <- factor(my_dat$severity, levels = c("1", "0"),
                          labels = c("severe", "not_severe"))
my_dat$gender <- factor(my_dat$gender, levels = c(0, 1),
                        labels = c("Female", "Male"))
my_dat$race <- factor(my_dat$race, levels = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
                      labels = c("White", "Asian", "Black", "Hispanic"))
my_dat$smoking <- factor(my_dat$smoking, levels = c(0, 1, 2),
                         labels = c("Never", "Former", "Current"))
my_dat$hypertension <- factor(my_dat$hypertension, levels = c(0, 1),
                              labels = c("No", "Yes"))
my_dat$diabetes <- factor(my_dat$diabetes, levels = c(0, 1), 
                          labels = c("No", "Yes"))
my_dat$vaccine <- factor(my_dat$vaccine, levels = c(0, 1),
                         labels = c("Unvaccinated", "Vaccinated"))

set.seed(3352)
data_split <- initial_split(my_dat, prop = 0.8, strata = severity)
training_data <- training(data_split)
testing_data <- testing(data_split)

table(training_data$severity)
## 
##     severe not_severe 
##        256        544
table(testing_data$severity)
## 
##     severe not_severe 
##         64        136

EDA

table_sum_stat <- training_data |>
  tbl_summary( by = severity, include = -c(severity),
    statistic = list(all_continuous()  ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                     all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"),
    digits = all_continuous() ~ 1 ) |> add_overall() |> bold_labels()

table_sum_stat
Characteristic Overall
N = 8001		 severe
N = 2561		 not_severe
N = 5441
age 60.2 (4.4) 61.4 (4.3) 59.6 (4.4)
gender


    Female 418 (52%) 140 (55%) 278 (51%)
    Male 382 (48%) 116 (45%) 266 (49%)

    White 509 (64%) 157 (61%) 352 (65%)

smoking


    Never 494 (62%) 148 (58%) 346 (64%)
    Former 234 (29%) 84 (33%) 150 (28%)

weight 80.1 (6.9) 80.7 (6.8) 79.8 (7.0)
bmi 27.7 (2.7) 28.3 (3.0) 27.5 (2.5)
diabetes 126 (16%) 53 (21%) 73 (13%)
hypertension 385 (48%) 153 (60%) 232 (43%)

vaccine


    Unvaccinated 323 (40%) 207 (81%) 116 (21%)

1 Mean (SD); n (%) 
# Figure 1: continuous predictors
featurePlot(x = training_data[, c("age", "height", "weight","bmi", "SBP", 
                                  "LDL", "depression")],
            y = training_data$severity, 
            scales = list(x = list(relation = "free"),
                          y = list(relation = "free")),
            plot = "box", pch = "|")

# Figure 2: categorical predictors
p1 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = gender, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Gender", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p2 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = race, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Race", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p3 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = smoking, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Smoking", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p4 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = hypertension, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Hypertension", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p5 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = diabetes, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Diabetes", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p6 <- ggplot(training_data, aes(x = vaccine, fill = severity)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("severe" = "hotpink", "not_severe" = "blue")) +
  labs(x = "Vaccination Status", y = "Proportion", fill = "Severity") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

(p1 + p2 + p3) / (p4 + p5 + p6) + plot_layout(guides = "collect") & 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

Fit model

ctrl <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 10,
                     summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
                     classProbs = TRUE)

# Model 1: simple glm
set.seed(3352)
model.glm <- train(severity ~ ., data = training_data, method = "glm",
                   metric = "ROC", trControl = ctrl)
# Model 2: elastic net
glmnGrid <- expand.grid(alpha = seq(0, 1, length = 6),
                        lambda = exp(seq(-12, -1, length = 20)))
set.seed(3352)
model.glmn <- train(severity ~ ., data = training_data, method = "glmnet",
                    tuneGrid = glmnGrid, metric = "ROC",  trControl = ctrl)
model.glmn$bestTune
##    alpha       lambda
## 45   0.4 6.225881e-05
max(model.glmn$results$ROC)
## [1] 0.8859611
plot(model.glmn, par.settings = myPar, xTrans = function(x) log(x))

# Model 3: Boosting
gbmA.grid <- expand.grid(n.trees = c(100, 200, 500, 1000, 2000, 5000, 10000),
                         interaction.depth = 1:5, 
                         shrinkage = c(0.001, 0.003, 0.005),
                         n.minobsinnode = 10)

set.seed(3352)
gbmA.fit <- train(severity ~ ., data = training_data,  method = "gbm",
                  distribution = "adaboost", tuneGrid = gbmA.grid, 
                  trControl = ctrl, metric = "ROC", verbose  = FALSE)

gbmA.fit$bestTune
##    n.trees interaction.depth shrinkage n.minobsinnode
## 81    1000                 2     0.005             10
max(gbmA.fit$results$ROC)
## [1] 0.8862192
ggplot(gbmA.fit, highlight = TRUE)

# Model 4: SVM
ctrl.svm <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 10)

svmr.grid <- expand.grid(C = exp(seq(6, 12, len = 15)), 
                         sigma = exp(seq(-14, -8, len = 6)))

set.seed(3352)
svmr.fit <- train(severity ~ ., data = training_data, 
                  method = "svmRadialSigma", tuneGrid = svmr.grid, 
                  trControl = ctrl.svm)

svmr.fit$bestTune
##           sigma        C
## 70 3.043248e-05 44994.06
svmr.fit$results

Model comparison

# resample
ctrl.acc <- trainControl(method = "cv", number = 10)

set.seed(3352)
model.glm2 <- train(severity ~ ., data = training_data, method = "glm",
                    trControl = ctrl.acc)
set.seed(3352)
model.glmn2 <- train(severity ~ ., data = training_data, method = "glmnet",
                     tuneGrid = glmnGrid, trControl = ctrl.acc)
set.seed(3352)
gbmA.fit2 <- train(severity ~ ., data = training_data, method = "gbm",
                   distribution = "adaboost", tuneGrid = gbmA.grid,
                   trControl = ctrl.acc, verbose = FALSE)

resamp.acc <- resamples(list(GLM  = model.glm2,
                             GLMN = model.glmn2,
                             GBM  = gbmA.fit2,
                             SVM  = svmr.fit))
summary(resamp.acc)
## 
## Call:
## summary.resamples(object = resamp.acc)
## 
## Models: GLM, GLMN, GBM, SVM 
## Number of resamples: 10 
## 
## Accuracy 
##           Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. NA's
## GLM  0.8000000 0.8148148 0.8260802 0.8364702 0.8454509 0.9113924    0
## GLMN 0.8000000 0.8406250 0.8553797 0.8513309 0.8633380 0.8987342    0
## GBM  0.8000000 0.8255401 0.8553797 0.8513621 0.8706883 0.9012346    0
## SVM  0.7901235 0.8276108 0.8500000 0.8451268 0.8611111 0.8987342    0
## 
## Kappa 
##           Min.   1st Qu.    Median      Mean   3rd Qu.      Max. NA's
## GLM  0.5441595 0.5723345 0.6052345 0.6211573 0.6374447 0.7883659    0
## GLMN 0.5325125 0.6260260 0.6627759 0.6515869 0.6986896 0.7607873    0
## GBM  0.5441595 0.5974429 0.6518997 0.6506851 0.6879976 0.7734266    0
## SVM  0.4817463 0.6049426 0.6546412 0.6422642 0.6855478 0.7659259    0
bwplot(resamp.acc)

Final model

# test set
glm.class <- predict(model.glm, newdata = testing_data, type = "raw")
glmn.class <- predict(model.glmn, newdata = testing_data, type = "raw")
gbm.class <- predict(gbmA.fit, newdata = testing_data, type = "raw")
svm.class <- predict(svmr.fit, newdata = testing_data, type = "raw")

# confusion matrix for glmn
cm.glmn <- confusionMatrix(glmn.class, testing_data$severity,
                           positive = "severe")
cm.glmn
## Confusion Matrix and Statistics
## 
##             Reference
## Prediction   severe not_severe
##   severe         47         17
##   not_severe     17        119
##                                           
##                Accuracy : 0.83            
##                  95% CI : (0.7706, 0.8793)
##     No Information Rate : 0.68            
##     P-Value [Acc > NIR] : 1.208e-06       
##                                           
##                   Kappa : 0.6094          
##                                           
##  Mcnemar's Test P-Value : 1               
##                                           
##             Sensitivity : 0.7344          
##             Specificity : 0.8750          
##          Pos Pred Value : 0.7344          
##          Neg Pred Value : 0.8750          
##              Prevalence : 0.3200          
##          Detection Rate : 0.2350          
##    Detection Prevalence : 0.3200          
##       Balanced Accuracy : 0.8047          
##                                           
##        'Positive' Class : severe          
## 
# compact four-model test set summary
cm.glm <- confusionMatrix(glm.class, testing_data$severity, 
                          positive = "severe")
cm.gbm <- confusionMatrix(gbm.class, testing_data$severity,
                          positive = "severe")
cm.svm <- confusionMatrix(svm.class, testing_data$severity, 
                          positive = "severe")

test.summary <- data.frame(
  Model = c("GLM", "GLMN", "GBM", "SVM"),
  Accuracy = round(c(cm.glm$overall["Accuracy"],
                     cm.glmn$overall["Accuracy"],
                     cm.gbm$overall["Accuracy"],
                     cm.svm$overall["Accuracy"]), 3),
  Sensitivity = round(c(cm.glm$byClass["Sensitivity"],
                        cm.glmn$byClass["Sensitivity"],
                        cm.gbm$byClass["Sensitivity"],
                        cm.svm$byClass["Sensitivity"]), 3),
  Specificity = round(c(cm.glm$byClass["Specificity"],
                        cm.glmn$byClass["Specificity"],
                        cm.gbm$byClass["Specificity"],
                        cm.svm$byClass["Specificity"]), 3),
  Kappa = round(c(cm.glm$overall["Kappa"],
                  cm.glmn$overall["Kappa"],
                  cm.gbm$overall["Kappa"],
                  cm.svm$overall["Kappa"]), 3))
test.summary
##   Model Accuracy Sensitivity Specificity Kappa
## 1   GLM    0.825       0.750       0.860 0.603
## 2  GLMN    0.830       0.734       0.875 0.609
## 3   GBM    0.840       0.734       0.890 0.629
## 4   SVM    0.830       0.734       0.875 0.609
# ROC curves
glm.pred <- predict(model.glm, newdata = testing_data, 
                    type = "prob")[, "severe"]
glmn.pred <- predict(model.glmn, newdata = testing_data, 
                     type = "prob")[, "severe"]
gbm.pred <- predict(gbmA.fit, newdata = testing_data, 
                    type = "prob")[, "severe"]

# ROC objects
roc.glm <- roc(testing_data$severity, glm.pred)
## Setting levels: control = severe, case = not_severe
## Setting direction: controls > cases
roc.glmn <- roc(testing_data$severity, glmn.pred)
## Setting levels: control = severe, case = not_severe
## Setting direction: controls > cases
roc.gbm <- roc(testing_data$severity, gbm.pred)
## Setting levels: control = severe, case = not_severe
## Setting direction: controls > cases
plot(roc.glm, col = 1, legacy.axes = TRUE)
plot(roc.glmn, col = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(roc.gbm, col = 3, add = TRUE)
legend("bottomright",
       legend = paste0(c("GLM", "GLMN", "GBM"), ": AUC = ",
                       round(c(roc.glm$auc, roc.glmn$auc, roc.gbm$auc), 3)),
       col = 1:3, lwd = 2)

Predictive risk score

risk_scores <- data.frame(ID = rownames(testing_data), 
                          Actual = testing_data$severity,
                          Prob_Severe = round(glmn.pred, 3),
                          Predicted = ifelse(glmn.pred > 0.5, 
                                             "severe", "not_severe"))

risk_scores <- risk_scores[order(risk_scores$Prob_Severe, decreasing = TRUE), ]

head(risk_scores, 10)
##      ID Actual Prob_Severe Predicted
## 60   60 severe       0.999    severe
## 101 101 severe       0.991    severe
## 89   89 severe       0.982    severe
## 148 148 severe       0.962    severe
## 157 157 severe       0.954    severe
## 37   37 severe       0.952    severe
## 65   65 severe       0.939    severe
## 66   66 severe       0.935    severe
## 142 142 severe       0.932    severe
## 107 107 severe       0.923    severe
tail(risk_scores, 10)
##      ID     Actual Prob_Severe  Predicted
## 56   56 not_severe       0.012 not_severe
## 64   64 not_severe       0.011 not_severe
## 15   15 not_severe       0.009 not_severe
## 99   99 not_severe       0.005 not_severe
## 117 117 not_severe       0.005 not_severe
## 11   11 not_severe       0.004 not_severe
## 59   59 not_severe       0.004 not_severe
## 166 166 not_severe       0.004 not_severe
## 141 141 not_severe       0.003 not_severe
## 28   28 not_severe       0.002 not_severe

Variable importance

# From GLMN
vip(model.glmn)

# From GBM
summary(gbmA.fit$finalModel, las = 2, cBars = 13, cex.names = 0.6)

##                                 var     rel.inf
## vaccineVaccinated vaccineVaccinated 49.58624143
## SBP                             SBP 20.61194467
## bmi                             bmi 11.15802222
## age                             age  5.68535811
## LDL                             LDL  3.87307056
## height                       height  3.56128898
## diabetesYes             diabetesYes  1.96246759
## weight                       weight  1.82167722
## depression               depression  0.96317707
## genderMale               genderMale  0.58371403
## smokingCurrent       smokingCurrent  0.08022390
## smokingFormer         smokingFormer  0.07374321
## raceHispanic           raceHispanic  0.01449988
## raceBlack                 raceBlack  0.01261569
## hypertensionYes     hypertensionYes  0.01195544
## raceAsian                 raceAsian  0.00000000
#Partial Dependence Plot
pdp.gbm.vaccine <- gbmA.fit |>
  pdp::partial(pred.var = "vaccine", prob = TRUE, train = training_data) |> 
  autoplot(rug = TRUE, train = training_data) + ggtitle("Vaccine")

pdp.gbm.sbp <- gbmA.fit |>
  pdp::partial(pred.var = "SBP", grid.resolution = 100, prob = TRUE,
               train = training_data) |>
  autoplot(rug = TRUE, train = training_data) + ggtitle("SBP")

pdp.gbm.bmi <- gbmA.fit |>
  pdp::partial(pred.var = "bmi", grid.resolution = 100, prob = TRUE,
               train = training_data) |>
  autoplot(rug = TRUE, train = training_data) + ggtitle("BMI")

pdp.gbm.age <- gbmA.fit |>
  pdp::partial(pred.var = "age", grid.resolution = 100, prob = TRUE,
               train = training_data) |>
  autoplot(rug = TRUE, train = training_data) + ggtitle("Age")

gridExtra::grid.arrange(pdp.gbm.vaccine, pdp.gbm.sbp, pdp.gbm.bmi,
                        pdp.gbm.age, nrow = 2, ncol = 2)
